name: ai-slop
description: Rules for writing and reviewing empirical software engineering research papers in LaTeX, packaged as an Agent Skill. Bundles SE-specific conventions (voice and tense, restricted vocabulary, statistical reporting, citations, BibTeX) and fetches the live AI-trope catalog from tropes.fyi at invocation.

plugins.name: ai-slop
plugins.description: Apply rules for writing and reviewing empirical SE research papers when editing .tex files, drafting prose, or auditing a draft for AI slop. Combines SE-specific conventions with the community-maintained tropes.fyi catalog of general AI writing patterns.
